description: Main source file for a Flutter application implementing a Tic Tac Toe game featuring a styled UI, game logic, and interactive grid.

classes.name: TicTacToeApp
classes.description: Root widget for the Tic Tac Toe Flutter application, configuring theme and setting home screen.

classes.name: TicTacToeScreen
classes.description: Stateful widget representing the main game interface, including game logic and UI rendering.

classes.name: _TicTacToeScreenState
classes.description: State class managing game state, handling user interaction, and building the UI for the game screen.

classes.name: _TurnPill
classes.description: Stateless widget displaying the active player indicator ('X' or 'O') with styling based on game state.

classes.name: _BoardTile
classes.description: Stateless widget representing each cell in the Tic Tac Toe grid, handling display and tap interactions.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point, runs the root widget.

methods.name: _buildTheme
methods.description: Constructs and returns the ThemeData object with custom styling based on seed colors.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes game state when the TicTacToeScreen widget is inserted into the widget tree.

methods.name: _resetGame
methods.description: Resets the game board, turn, and game result to start a new game.

methods.name: _findWinningLine
methods.description: Checks all possible winning combinations and returns the winning line indices or empty if none.

methods.name: _isDraw
methods.description: Determines whether the game is a draw when all cells are filled without a winner.

methods.name: _recomputeResult
methods.description: Updates game result based on current board state (win/draw/in progress).

methods.name: _playAt
methods.description: Handles user tap on a cell to place a mark and updates game state.

methods.name: _playerColor
methods.description: Returns the color representing the player's mark ('X' or 'O').

methods.name: _statusText
methods.description: Provides the status message based on game progress.
